allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\({k:{'final_loss':round\(v['final_loss'],3\),'mAP':round\(v['metrics']['mAP'],3\),'losses':[round\(x,2\) for x in v['loss_curve']]} for k,v in d.items\(\)}\)")
